@techreview Musk says he made the last $5 million quarterly donation to OpenAI in May 2017 and stopped paying for OpenAI's office rent in 2020. 

OpenAI's lawyer points out that Musk's brain implant company Neuralink was part of the same building that OpenAI's office was in and that Musk was on the hook for the lease of the entire building. Musk says he would've sublet the space if he didn't give it to OpenAI. "I gave OpenAI a $3 million a year building," he says.

Would you dare believe that one day the dreaded Alzheimer's disease could be eradicated by a tiny chip?

Elon Musk officially declared that Neuralink would benefit "billions of people." It's not just a tech gadget, but a 'miracle' of resurrection. Imagine this:
Parents suffering from dementia suddenly calling their children and grandchildren by their correct names.
People who have been bedridden for years suddenly standing up and walking around as if nothing had ever happened.

kept.text:
Elon Musk: "It's (Neuralink) basically a communications bridge. You bridge communications from the motor cortex past the point in the neck or spine where the nerves are damaged

It is possible from a physics standpoint to restore full body functionality. It's a very hard technical problem, but there is nothing that prevents it happening from a physics standpoint"

Neuralink has built a surgical robot that automates the key steps when putting in their brain implant.

The whole point is to make the procedure safer, more reliable, and something they can eventually do for way more people.

This company, like all of Elon’s companies, is changing the world for the better. 

@neuralink

kept.text:
The Elon Musk effect : Innovator, Job Creator & Humanitarian Visionary

Did you know that Elon Musk’s companies — Tesla, SpaceX, X, xAI, Neuralink, and The Boring Company — employ approximately 150,000 people worldwide?

Tesla alone accounts for around 135,000 of those jobs, powering the future of sustainable energy and transportation.

But Musk’s impact goes far beyond creating employment. He has donated services, products, and time on multiple occasions to benefit humanity:

•  Starlink terminals & free internet service provided to Ukraine (thousands of units during the war), disaster zones hit by hurricanes, and other crises worldwide — keeping people connected when they needed it most.

•  During the COVID-19 pandemic, Tesla produced and donated over 1,200 breathing devices plus tens of thousands of masks to hospitals.

•  Through the Musk Foundation and personal contributions, he has donated billions in Tesla stock to charity and open-sourced Tesla’s electric vehicle patents to accelerate the world’s shift to sustainable energy.

He has also initiated major competitions that directly benefit humanity:

•  Funded the $100 Million XPRIZE for Carbon Removal — the largest incentive prize in history — to fight climate change and inspire global innovation.

•  Launched the Hyperloop Pod Competitions, sparking worldwide student and engineering teams to develop ultra-fast, efficient transportation technologies.

Elon doesn’t just talk about solving humanity’s biggest challenges — he invests his time, resources, companies, and relentless drive to make multiplanetary life, sustainable energy, and a better future for all a reality.

profile_bio.description: Tesla investor. here to support Elon Musk! https://t.co/bP1dB3xPjb

kept.text:
Neuralink just released a new video on their R1 surgical robot:
• Inserts 128 ultra-thin, flexible threads (each thinner than a human hair, ~1/10th the width) containing a total of 1,024 electrodes directly into living brain tissue
• Thread insertion now takes just 1.5 seconds per thread (major improvement from ~17 seconds previously)
• Real-time high-resolution vision system maps and actively avoids every surface blood vessel to eliminate bleeding risk during insertion
• Enables deeper thread placement (>50 mm), accessing many brain regions
• Redesigned needle cartridge is 95% cheaper to manufacture for high-volume production
• Engineered for compatibility with 99% of the global population
• Full procedure designed for precision, repeatability, and one-day “one-click” automation potential

kept.text:
Day 2 - Musk v Altman OpenAI trial

Elon Musk told jurors that Shivon Zilis‘ official’ job title was “chief of staff”.  The projects at Neuralink were being discussed at that time. So her “Chief of Staff” was in reference to Neuralink.

IMPORTANT TO NOTE: 
💥SHITVON ZILIS was being PAID  BY  BOTH -
She was being paid as a “consultant” by @OpenAI as per her deposition AND evidently “Chief of Staff” at @Neuralink by Elon 
- AT THE SAME TIME!!

🚨Whether SHIT ZILIS was called "chief of staff," "executive secretary," or  "office worker," the important thing is that she was the operational  hub. In corporate governance trials, the "office worker" is usually the  person who knows the most about who received what information and when.  If she was the filter, she was the one who decided which of Musk's  emails would be prioritized and which would be ignored.

💥From her emails it seems that she took it as if she could do whatever she wanted. She did whatever she wanted, without consulting anyone, and completely ignoring Musk's instructions.

✅ SHIT ZILIS was an infiltrator for OpenAI or Musk, because she was infiltrated  on both sides, but clearly favoring OpenAI according to the emails.  

✅There are no emails that say she favored Neuralink or Musk, because they  all point to her being against Musk and in favor of OpenAI.

kept.text:
“Ebediyet”

🔥 Elon Musk tarihin en büyük bombasını patlattı: Ölümün ortadan kalkması.

Akademik bir makalede değil. Resmi bir konferansta değil. Sanki hiçbir şey olmamış gibi, bir zirvenin ortasında bunu rastgele söyledi.

Musk: “Temelde bir tür ölümsüzlük olan tam bir beyin arayüzüne sahip olacaksınız. Zihinsel durumunuz kaydedilecek. Bir sabit diske yedekleneceksiniz.” 💾🧠
Dünya hala Neuralink'in felçli birinin zihniyle imleci hareket ettirmesi için tıbbi bir cihaz olduğunu düşünüyor.

Uygarlığı yıkacak araca bakıyorlar… ve sadece ilk kullanımını görüyorlar.

Ve devam ediyor: “Bu beyni her zaman yeni bir biyolojik bedende… veya bir robotta, her neyse, geri yükleyebilirsiniz.”

Anılarınız. Kişiliğiniz. Bilinçli “benliğiniz.” Hepsi kaydedildi, yedeklendi ve orijinal donanım arızalandığında aktarılabilir.

Bu artık tıp değil.

Bu, insanlığın en eski sözleşmesini iptal etmek anlamına geliyor.

Her medeniyet tek, sarsılmaz bir gerçek üzerine kurulmuştur:
Doğuyorsunuz → birkaç on yıl yaşıyorsunuz → ölüyorsunuz.
Din, miras kanunları, ekonomi, hukuk, felsefe… her şey bu gerçekten kaynaklanıyor.
İnsanlar ölüyor.
Bu gerçeği ortadan kaldırırsanız, toplumu yeniden şekillendirmiyorsunuz… onu bir arada tutan tüm yapıların pimini çıkarıyorsunuz. 💥 Sonra Musk bunu yapay zeka yarışına bağladı:
“Dijital süper zekaya o kadar hızlı ilerliyoruz ki, belki de bu sorunu bizim için çözecek. Bu arada, insan bilgisayarlarımızla ilerlemeye devam ediyoruz.”
İnsan bilgisayarları.

Bu karanlık bir şaka değil. Tam olarak teknik bir özellik.

Milyarlarca doların süper zekaya para harcamasının gerçek nedeni verimlilik veya sohbet robotları değil.
Bu, türün en eski ve en umutsuz sorunu: nasıl ölmemek.

Bu yarışa sermaye enjekte eden her kurucu sadece bir şirket kurmuyor. Kendi biyolojisini alt edebilecek bir saat inşa ediyor. ⏳
Eski dünya sonu kabul etti ve ona göre plan yaptı.

Yeni inşaatçılar bunu yapmıyor. Doğrudan sona karşı mühendislik yapıyorlar.

Ve işte kimsenin sormak istemediği soru:
Yaptığınız her acil şey, aldığınız her risk, gerçekten önemli olan her an…
zamanınızın tükenmekte olduğunun sessiz farkındalığıyla yönlendirildi.

Ölüm sadece sizi öldüren şey değildi.

Sizi ayakta tutan şeydi. ⚡
İnşaatçılar bunu ortadan kaldırmak istiyor.

Ve henüz kimse sormadı:

İnsan ırkının saygı duyduğu tek son tarihin yerine ne koyacağız?

kept.text:
Damn，OpenAI这次在法庭上真把自己坑惨了🤣👀🤯

律师昨天甩出2022年Sam发给马斯克的一条短信，想证明：“当年我们主动给你股权，你自己不要，现在告我们就是恶意竞争。”

结果马斯克当庭一句话直接翻盘：
“非营利组织里，我怎么可能有股权？”

一句话，把对方证据变成了自打脸。
说你们当年承诺是501(c)(3)慈善组织，法律上就不允许存在股权。
现在拿“给过股权”当证据，正好坐实了——你们从过渡期开始，就已经在把公益初心往商业帝国转了。

更讽刺的是，同条短信里Sam还说：“我个人从来没有股权，也永远不会有。”

后来大家发现，他通过OpenAI Startup Fund等渠道有过实际控制/利益关联（虽然后来调整了）。

还有个狗血细节：这条短信是Sam和Shivon Zilis一起起草的——她是Neuralink高管、马斯克孩子的妈妈之一……

感觉这已经不是简单官司了，
已经把AI时代的核心矛盾摆在台面上了：
一个承诺造福全人类的非营利组织，变成估值千亿的商业帝国，
初心到底是被背叛了，
还是“不得不转型”？
谁该负责，法庭和公众都在看。

quoted_tweet.text:
补充一个关键时间点，马斯克是本次审判的第一证人，作证了近两个小时，明天还会继续出庭，后续的证词可能会爆出更多OpenAI内部的黑料。

而一年前的今天，马斯克开价974亿美元，要全资收购OpenAI，
Sam只说了两句话，公司不出售，使命也不出售，
当时全网都在夸他有骨气，不为钱折腰，
现在回头看，才发现这个决定有多疯狂，
974亿不是普通的收购价，能一键清零OpenAI所有问题的价格，
能直接结束马斯克的诉讼，
能解决未来五年的所有烧钱压力，
能让所有早期股东和员工安全落地，
甚至能彻底平息所有关于使命漂移的争议，
但Sam拒绝了，
他选择了把所有风险都扛在自己身上，
选择了继续all in通用人工智能的未来，
现在一年过去了，
诉讼还在进行，
每年烧钱超过150亿美元，
非营利转营利的争议从来没有停过，
当初所有能用钱解决的问题，
现在全变成了悬在OpenAI头上的剑，
没有人知道Sam的选择是对是错，
也许在2027年之前，历史就会给出答案，
要么Sam成为人类历史上最伟大的创业者，
要么974亿美元，会成为商业史上最昂贵的一个拒绝🙅
